scripts.clean: rm -rf *.tsbuildinfo internal/*.tsbuildinfo test/*.tsbuildinfo ts/*.tsbuildinfo ts/_esm ts/_cjs ts/_types test/ts/.consumer test/ts/.tarballs test/ts/.vitest-cache test/ts/node_modules
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run prettier:check && npm run lint && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm && npm run build:types
scripts.build:tarball: npm run build:templates && npm run build && npm run pack:tarball
scripts.build:templates: forge clean && forge build && node internal/generateTemplates.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:templates && npm run test:tarball
scripts.test:templates: npm run clean:tarball-consumer && npm run build:templates && node --test --test-concurrency=1 test/*.test.ts
scripts.test:upgrade-e2e: npm run clean:tarball-consumer && npm run build:templates && npm run build && npm run prepare:tarball-consumer && node internal/prepareV13Consumer.ts && tsc --project test/ts/tsconfig.e2e.json --noEmit && vitest run --config test/ts/vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.test:tarball: npm run clean:tarball-consumer && npm run build:templates && npm run build && npm run prepare:tarball-consumer && npm run lint:tarball-consumer && vitest run --config test/ts/vitest.config.ts
scripts.lint: eslint --config ./eslint.config.js --ignore-pattern "internal/deploy-local/**" --ignore-pattern test/ts/tarball-consumer.test.ts --ignore-pattern test/ts/acl-owner-upgrade.test.ts --ignore-pattern test/ts/deploy-v14.test.ts --ignore-pattern test/ts/deploy-at.test.ts --ignore-pattern test/ts/viemEthereumLib.ts --ignore-pattern test/ts/ethUtils.ts && tsc -b ./tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.lint:tarball-consumer: eslint --config ./eslint.config.js test/ts/*.ts internal/deploy-local/*.ts && tsc --project test/ts/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc --project internal/deploy-local/tsconfig.json --noEmit
